title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: A podcast discussion raises concerns about AI spending efficiency, noting that only 18% of tokens fund products that ship and that companies may be reconsidering AI investments due to exploding token consumption. Topics include circular venture financing in AI, Anthropic's valuation milestone, and ethical issues around AI integration in consumer services like trading and data collection.
